name: Nouah Labs
tagline: Mobile apps and websites with product discipline.
description: Nouah Labs is a focused app development studio for founders and teams that need thoughtful mobile apps, web products, and launch-ready digital systems.

name: Hirelify
tagline: A focused mobile app for better job applications.
description: Hirelify helps job seekers organize application materials, improve CV readiness, and move from preparation to application with less friction.
authorizedDomainNotes: Use nouahlabs.com as the authorized domain. Store and OAuth console URLs should use explicit /en/ paths.
reviewerNotes: Public store URLs and demo credentials should be added before review if the app requires authentication.

title: Privacy Policy
summary: This policy explains how Nouah Labs and the apps we publish collect, use, protect, retain, and delete personal information.

sections.heading: Information we collect
sections.body: Depending on the app or service, we may collect account details, contact information, profile details, device information, diagnostics, app activity, support messages, and content you choose to submit.

sections.heading: How we use information
sections.body: We use information to provide app functionality, authenticate users, operate support, improve reliability, prevent abuse, respond to legal requests, and communicate important service updates.

sections.heading: Retention and deletion
sections.body: We retain information only as long as needed for the app, legal, safety, fraud-prevention, and support purposes. Users can request account and data deletion from the account deletion page.

title: Terms of Service
summary: These terms define the rules for using Nouah Labs websites, mobile apps, web apps, and support services.

sections.heading: Use of services
sections.body: You may use Nouah Labs services only in lawful ways and only according to the rules shown in the relevant app, store listing, and these terms.

sections.heading: Accounts
sections.body: You are responsible for the accuracy of account information and for keeping your credentials secure. We may restrict accounts that violate these terms or create safety risks.

sections.heading: Prohibited behavior
sections.body: Do not misuse the services, attempt unauthorized access, interfere with service operation, infringe intellectual property rights, harass others, or submit illegal or harmful content.

title: User-Generated Content Policy
summary: This policy applies to Nouah Labs apps that allow users to post, send, upload, share, or display content to other users.

sections.heading: Objectionable content
sections.body: Users may not submit content that is illegal, exploitative, sexually abusive, hateful, threatening, harassing, bullying, deceptive, spammy, or otherwise unsafe for the service.

sections.heading: Moderation
sections.body: Nouah Labs may review reports, remove content, restrict accounts, preserve evidence when legally required, and escalate urgent safety issues to appropriate channels.

sections.heading: Reporting and blocking
sections.body: Apps with social or sharing features should include in-app reporting and blocking. Non-users and users without app access can use the public report page.

title: Account and Data Deletion
summary: Use this page to request deletion of an account and associated personal data from a Nouah Labs app.

sections.heading: What can be deleted
sections.body: Deletion requests cover the account and personal data associated with that account, subject to limited retention required for security, fraud prevention, legal obligations, dispute handling, and transaction records.

sections.heading: What we need
sections.body: Provide the app name, account email or phone number, and any details needed to identify the account. Do not send passwords or one-time codes.

sections.heading: Processing
sections.body: We will review the request, verify ownership when needed, and complete eligible deletion requests within a reasonable period.

title: Report Content or Safety Issue
summary: Use this page to report objectionable content, abusive users, illegal content, safety concerns, or policy violations in a Nouah Labs app.

sections.heading: What to report
sections.body: Reports can cover abusive behavior, illegal content, child safety concerns, harassment, impersonation, scams, privacy concerns, intellectual property complaints, or other policy violations.

sections.heading: Review process
sections.body: We review reports based on severity, available evidence, applicable law, and the product policy. Actions may include removing content, restricting users, preserving evidence, or contacting the reporter for more information.

sections.heading: Urgent risk
sections.body: If there is immediate danger, contact local emergency services first. The report form is not an emergency service.

title: Hirelify
subtitle: A focused mobile app for stronger job applications.
description: Hirelify helps job seekers shape clearer CVs, organize application materials, and move from preparation to submission with less friction.

title: Mobile App Development
shortDescription: Native and cross-platform mobile apps that users love to use.
longDescription: We design and develop mobile applications for iOS and Android that combine beautiful interfaces with robust, scalable architecture. Whether you need a consumer app, an internal tool, or a companion to your existing product, we deliver experiences that feel natural and perform flawlessly.
features: Cross-platform with React Native or Flutter

title: Website Design & Development
shortDescription: Premium websites that make a strong first impression and drive results.
longDescription: Your website is often the first thing people see. We build fast, beautiful, and conversion-focused websites that tell your story and turn visitors into customers. Every site is custom-designed, responsive, and built on modern technology for speed and reliability.

title: Web Application Development
shortDescription: Powerful web apps that handle complex workflows with elegance.
longDescription: From SaaS platforms to internal tools, we build web applications that scale with your business. We focus on clean architecture, intuitive interfaces, and reliable performance so your team and your users can focus on what matters.

title: MVP & Product Development
shortDescription: From idea to launch — fast. We help you validate and ship your product.
longDescription: Have an idea but need to move fast? We help startups and founders turn concepts into shipped products. Our MVP process is designed to get your product into users' hands quickly, gather feedback, and iterate toward product-market fit without wasting time or budget.

title: Product Design
shortDescription: Thoughtful design that balances aesthetics with usability.
longDescription: Great products start with great design. Our design process goes beyond making things look good — we focus on understanding user needs, simplifying complex workflows, and creating interfaces that feel effortless. Every design decision is intentional and backed by clear thinking.

title: Admin Dashboards
shortDescription: Clean, functional dashboards that give you control over your data.
longDescription: We build admin dashboards and internal tools that make managing your business easier. From analytics and reporting to user management and content operations, our dashboards are designed to be powerful without being overwhelming.

quote: Nouah Labs moved us from idea to a production-ready MVP quickly and with real product discipline.
author: Aline M.

quote: Their team balances design quality and engineering rigor. Execution was fast and predictable.
author: David K.

title: Discovery
description: We start by understanding your goals, your users, and your market. This phase shapes everything that follows and ensures we're solving the right problem.

title: Design
description: We create wireframes, prototypes, and visual designs that bring your vision to life. Every screen is crafted with purpose before a single line of code is written.

title: Build
description: Our engineers bring the designs to life with clean, scalable code. We build in short cycles, keeping you involved and informed at every step.

title: Launch
description: We handle testing, optimization, and deployment to ensure a smooth launch. Post-launch, we stay available to support and iterate based on real user feedback.
